about:
Spearheading J&J Worldwide Services' RCM program, my focus lies in leveraging over six years' expertise in vibration analysis and ultrasonic testing to drive maintenance excellence. With a solid foundation in nondestructive testing, I excel in analyzing intricate vibration data and implementing preventive maintenance strategies that ensure operational integrity and efficiency.

As a seasoned professional in healthcare facility operations, our team has enhanced inventory management systems, contributing to the seamless operation of Government and J&J services. My commitment to excellence is underscored by a dedication to continuous improvement and a deep-rooted understanding of the industry's complex dynamics.
headline: RCM Engineering Ops Director Supporting Johson & Johnson

certifications.name: Certified Healthcare Constructor Examination
certifications.companyName: American Society for Health Care Engineering (ASHE)

certifications.name: ASNT NDT Level I Certification - Infrared/Thermal Testing (ASNT-SNT-TC-1A)

positionList.title: Sr. Analyst Operations SMB
positionList.description:
• Collaborated with Retail employees and Business Account Executives to implement standard Small to Medium business processes in Central Texas.
• Generated daily reports on key metrics, eliminating redundancies, and driving performance improvements.
• Conducted district trainings to enhance operational efficiency and support Retail and Business Leadership.

positionList.title: Retail Sales Solution Specialist
positionList.description:
• Leveraged VZW product knowledge to inspire customers and drive sales, ensuring they left with the best solutions.
• Assisted store managers in deescalating customer issues, finding win-win solutions for both customers and the company.
• Completed additional development programs to gain a deeper understanding of the company's operations and better support customers.

positionList.title: Rep -Retail Customer Support Specialist
positionList.description:
• Provided exceptional customer service and communication skills to create engaging in-store experiences for Verizon Wireless customers in Laredo, Texas.
• Conducted one-on-one training sessions for customers on new devices, contracts, and bills, enhancing their technical knowledge and loyalty.
• Supported daily business operations, including selling technology solutions, stocking inventory, and processing customer transactions, contributing to the overall health and performance of the retail store.

positionList.title: RCM Program Manager
positionList.description:
• Led site startup for RCM programs at 7+ sites, implementing vibration analysis, thermography, ultrasound, and oil analysis.
• Developed a uniform RCM report meeting DHA requirements for government submissions across all sites.
• Trained teams in RCM process, created maintenance project tracking system, and prevented government concerns.

positionList.title: Service Order/CBM Manager
positionList.description:
• Led a team in data collection and analysis of vibration, thermography, and ultrasound data for 7 years.
• Trained team members to ensure reports were completed on time and presented findings to executive leadership.
• Achieved successful completion of tasks by set deadlines and presented findings to executive government officials.

positionList.title: Level II Vibration Analyst
positionList.description:
• Led a team to process $5 million worth of maintenance construction projects in ten months.
• Collaborated with executive leadership on implementing new accounting software JAMIS.
• Coordinated project walks, scheduling, and outages with various departments.
• Developed and adhered to timelines, budgets, and quality control standards for each project.

positionList.title: Continuous Base Monitoring  Planner/Scheduler
positionList.description:
• Developed 31 standard operating procedures and implemented 206 preventive maintenance for vibration analysis, enhancing data collection accuracy.
• Coordinated critical equipment repairs by scheduling outages with facilities and end-users, ensuring minimal downtime.
• Digitized PM documentation in the DMLSS database, streamlining Continuous Based Monitoring (CBM) processes for J&J Worldwide Services in San Antonio, Texas.

positionList.title: Service Line Contract Planner
positionList.description:
• Streamlined processes for new maintenance construction projects contracts, aligning with corporate and national policies.
• Assisted in developing an operations and maintenance tracking program, including beta testing and suggesting improvements.
• Created a monthly profit vs. projected numbers tracking system to analyze project profit margins.

positionList.title: Customer Service Associate
positionList.description:
• Provided high quality customer service on inbound calls, handling Tier 1 troubleshooting for device assistance.
• Managed customer relationships by empathizing and acknowledging customers to create trust and partnership.
• Resolved customer concerns using negotiation and problem-solving skills to find the best solutions.
